chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 2130 of 2012 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.4403/2013 (C/A) 08.08.2024 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Similar was the case on the last date of hearing. Even matter was disposed of vide order dated 23.01.2013, however, thereafter the contempt application was made, but no one has come otherwise to pursue the same for a number of years. The application, therefore, is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
